name: HIP 60865
archival_rv_summary: No archival RV; Gaia DR3 NSS Orbital + HGCA Brandt 2024 chi^2=10.5 (independent 25-yr PM anomaly corroboration). G 123-34 = Luyten high-PM star (M dwarf).
filters_passed: 35/35 + v2 tuned + HGCA-corroborated (chi^2=10.5 in CORROBORATED range)
notes: NEW from comprehensive v2 scan. NSS Orbital P=500.69 d, e=0.25, M_2_marg=48.8 MJ. HGCA Brandt 2024 chi^2=10.5 confirms real 25-yr PM anomaly INDEPENDENT of NSS fit. Faint M-dwarf host (V=12.09, G 123-34). RUWE=3.84 (expected for orbital reflex). Significance=34.1. Pure Orbital solution type (FP-class-cleared). NOT in NASA Exo, NOT in exoplanet.eu (5 arcsec), NOT in SB9.

name: HD 76078
archival_rv_summary: No archival RV time-series found. SIMBAD object_type=SB* (already known SB but no published companion mass). 29 ADS bibcodes 1850-2026; none claim a substellar companion. NOT in exoplanet.eu (404). NOT in Halbwachs/Gaia DR3 binary_masses (no DPAC joint fit). NOT in Sahlmann 2025 list. NOT in NASA Exo PS.
notes: NEW from v7 hunt + v8 Filter #28 fix (2026-05-17). NSS Orbital P=274.6 d, e=0.29, M_2_face=68.6 MJ, M_2_marg=77.8 MJ (2σ_hi=121 — marg lies just below 80 MJ threshold; mass borderline substellar). HGCA Brandt 2024 chi^2=9.4 in CORROBORATED range (5-30). G5 dwarf at d=136 pc, V=8.72. RUWE=1.60 (low — passes both lax and strict cuts). non_single_star=3 (Orbital+Acceleration both apply; strengthens binary detection). ipd_frac_multi_peak=0 (no resolved binarity).

name: BD+56 1762
archival_rv_summary: No archival RV time-series found. SIMBAD object_type=Em* (emission-line star; chromospheric activity is an activity-imposter risk — see Mowlavi+ 2022, Olivier+ 2023 Gaia DR3 variability catalogs). 24 ADS bibcodes; none claim a substellar companion. NOT in exoplanet.eu (404). IN Halbwachs/Gaia DR3 binary_masses with Method=Orbital+M1 BUT no SB2/SB1 photometric flux decomposition (no FluxRatio). NOT in Sahlmann 2025 list. NOT in NASA Exo PS.
notes: NEW from v7 hunt + v8 Filter #28 fix (2026-05-17). NSS Orbital P=197.3 d, e=0.42, M_2_face=67.7 MJ, M_2_marg=69.1 MJ (2σ_hi=96 — narrower than HD 76078). HGCA Brandt 2024 chi^2=10.3 in CORROBORATED range (5-30). G5/G7 dwarf at d=98 pc, V=10.03. RUWE=2.27 (above strict 2.0 cut but expected for orbital reflex; conditional lax<7 applies). non_single_star=1 (Orbital only). ipd_frac_multi_peak=1 (low — no resolved binarity). CAVEAT: Em* SIMBAD classification flags chromospheric/emission-line activity; if RV jitter is large the inferred orbital amplitude may be partially activity-driven. Activity-jitter check recommended before claiming detection.
